recommendations.title: Return of the Hero
recommendations.overview: France, 1809. Captain Neuville is called to the front, leaving his future bride heartbroken. Her sister decides to write letters on his behalf to cheer her up.

recommendations.title: Nicholas on Holiday
recommendations.overview: It's the end of the school year. The long-awaited moment of the holidays is arrive. The little Nicolas, her parents and Grandma take the road towards the sea, and settle in for some time at the Hotel Beau-Rivage.

recommendations.title: Little Nicholas
recommendations.overview: Nicolas has a happy existence, parents who love him, a great group of friends with whom he has great fun, and all he wants is that nothing changes. However, one day, he overhears a conversation that leads him to believe that his life might change for

recommendations.title: Asterix & Obelix: God Save Britannia
recommendations.overview: Asterix crosses the channel to help second-cousin Anticlimax face down Julius Caesar and invading Romans.

recommendations.title: Moliere
recommendations.overview: Molière, a down-and-out actor-cum-playwright up to his ears in debt. When the wealthy Jourdain offers to cover that debt so that Molière's theatrical talents might help Jourdain win the heart of a certain widowed marquise, hilarity ensues.

recommendations.title: Up for Love
recommendations.overview: Diane is a well-known lawyer, divorced for three years. She loses her mobile telephone and receives a call from the person who finds it. That person is Alexandre, a charming man and the perfect gentleman. They make a connection over the phone and agr

recommendations.title: It's a Disaster
recommendations.overview: Four couples meet for Sunday brunch only to discover they are stuck in a house together as the world may be about to end.

recommendations.title: American Beauty
recommendations.overview: Lester Burnham, a depressed suburban father in a mid-life crisis, decides to turn his hectic life around after developing an infatuation with his daughter's attractive friend.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: How About Adolf?
recommendations.overview: The family dinner at Stephan and Elisabeth could have been wonderful. But when Thomas announces that he and his pregnant girlfriend Anna are going to call their son Adolf, the hosts and the family friend René are stuck in the throat.
